creator: rfg-freebsd@tristatelogic.com
text:
Users of the standard library mq_open() function will likely need to make use of one or more of the O_* macros mentioned in the relevant man page, e.g. O_CREAT.

Unfortunately, the man page for mq_open() only suggest inclusion of the <mqueue.h> system-supplied header file.  It should also suggest inclusion of <fcntl.h> which is needed in order to also drag in the various O_* macro definitions.
